titleStmt.title: SII 16.109: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 109. (A.R. No. 55 of 1915.) CHINNA AHŌBALAM, SIRVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Round the base of the central shrine of the Narasiṁhasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 14[58] (current), Manmatha, Chaitra, śu. 15, corresponding to 1535 A.D., March 19, (Friday).

The epigraph is damaged. It seems to register some grant to Viṭhalam Anantappa by Purushōttama-Jiyya of the temple, and Viṭhalam Timmarasu, the agent of Chinna Tirumalarājayya for offerings to the god on certain occasions (tithiargas).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śubhamastu . dēvaśrēṇiśirōratnaṁ daityadvibha(pa)ghaṭāṁkuśaṁ jayatu śrīnāra siṁhasya dēvadēvasyaśāsanaṁ . svasti śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 14 58 Agunēṭi manmadhasaṁvatsara cayitra śu 15 śrīmadrājādhi rāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī [Acyu]tadēvamahārāyalu pṛdhvīrājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmatērāmānujāyanamaḥ . śrīmadvēdavēdāṁtapratiṣṭāpa nācārya paramahaṁsa parivrājakā
cāryulayina śrīpuruṣōttamajiyyaṁgārunnu śrī Ahōbalastānaṁvāruṁnu cenna tirumala rājayyavāri Adhikāri viṭhalaṁ tiṁmarasugāruṁnu [Adikaṁ]vāruṁnu kāsyapagōtra Āsvalāyanasūtra yajuśyākhādhyāyulaina viṭhalaṁ Anaṁtapaṁgāri
[Ahō]balamaṁdu tithivargālu vēṁcēsinappuḍallānu [Āra] giṁcē taḷige 1 ki Amudapaḍi paṁnyāraṁ pōṁkalu 12 Ākulu 12 Ācaṁdrārkastāyigānu naḍapukanoṁ galavāramu Ani Iccina silā dhaṁrma śāsanaṁ . yī dhaṁrmānaku
damaged
Digital edition of SII 16.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
